page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Powerful tool designed for mapping of short reads onto a reference genome from Illumina, Ion Torrent, and 454 NGS platforms
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Powerful tool designed for mapping of short reads onto a reference genome from Illumina, Ion Torrent, and 454 NGS platforms
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool designed for mapping short reads from Illumina, IonTorrent or 454 platforms onto a reference genome. This is a commercial product.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool designed for mapping short reads from Illumina, IonTorrent or 454 platforms onto a reference genome. This is a commercial product.
